title: oxyceros jasminiflorus
intro: Oxyceros jasminiflorus, also known as the jasmine vine or night-flowering jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and is characterized by its fragrant, star-shaped flowers that bloom at night and wilt by dawn. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities, which are said to aid in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Oxyceros jasminiflorus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Oxyceros jasminiflorus include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and dried flower powders, which can be used in various forms to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
